ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the trainer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the trainer */,
  "trainer_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the trainer */,
  "trainer_license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number for the trainer */,
  "trainer_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "trainer_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the trainer */,
  "trainer_website" TEXT /* URL of the trainer's website */,
  "trainer_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handle of the trainer */,
  "trainer_rank" TEXT /* Current ranking or position in the industry */,
  "trainer_awards" TEXT /* List of awards and achievements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "win_percentage" TEXT /* Win percentage */,
  "places" INTEGER /* Number of places */,
  "place_percentage" TEXT /* Place percentage */,
  "rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides */,
  "prize_money_aud" TEXT /* Total prize money earned in AUD */,
  "g1_wins" INTEGER /* Number of G1 race wins */,
  "g2_wins" INTEGER /* Number of G2 race wins */,
  "g3_wins" INTEGER /* Number of G3 race wins */,
  "lr_wins" INTEGER /* Number of Listed race wins */,
  "roi" TEXT /* Return on investment (ROI) */,
  "trainer_performance_year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "trainer_performance_month" INTEGER /* Month of the performance data */,
  "top_three_finishes" INTEGER /* Number of top three finishes */,
  "top_five_finishes" INTEGER /* Number of top five finishes */,
  "average_finishing_position" REAL /* Average finishing position */,
  "highest_earnings_race" TEXT /* Name of the race with the highest earnings */,
  "highest_earnings_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the highest earnings in AUD */,
  "lowest_earnings_race" TEXT /* Name of the race with the lowest earnings */,
  "lowest_earnings_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the lowest earnings in AUD */,
  "best_horse" TEXT /* Name of the best-performing horse */,
  "best_horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the best-performing horse */,
  "worst_horse" TEXT /* Name of the worst-performing horse */,
  "worst_horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worst-performing horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_performance_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location of the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., G1, G2, G3, LR) */,
  "distance_meters" INTEGER /* Distance of the race in meters */,
  "prize_money_aud" TEXT /* Total prize money for the race in AUD */,
  "race_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the race */,
  "race_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the race */,
  "race_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "race_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "race_category" TEXT /* Category of the race */,
  "race_entry_fee" TEXT /* Entry fee for the race in AUD */,
  "race_prize_money_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of prize money among top finishers */,
  "race_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the race sponsor */,
  "race_distance_unit" TEXT /* Unit of distance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_location FOREIGN KEY ("race_location") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_type FOREIGN KEY ("race_type") REFERENCES race_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the horse in the race */,
  "prize_money_aud" TEXT /* Prize money earned by the horse in AUD */,
  "horse_age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse in the race */,
  "horse_weight" REAL /* Weight of the horse in the race */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "jockey_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the jockey */,
  "horse_start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse */,
  "horse_finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the horse */,
  "horse_odds" TEXT /* Odds of the horse at the start of the race */,
  "horse_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the horse's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer of the horse */,
  "horse_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the horse */,
  "horse_color" TEXT /* Color of the horse */,
  "horse_breeder" TEXT /* Name of the breeder */,
  "horse_owner" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "horse_trainer_start_date" TEXT /* Date the horse started training with the current trainer */,
  "horse_career_start_date" TEXT /* Date the horse started its racing career */,
  "horse_career_earnings" TEXT /* Total career earnings in AUD */,
  "horse_career_wins" INTEGER /* Total career wins */,
  "horse_career_places" INTEGER /* Total career places */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the venue */,
  "venue_establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the venue was established */,
  "venue_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the venue */,
  "venue_elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the venue */,
  "venue_location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the venue */,
  "venue_website" TEXT /* URL of the venue's website */,
  "venue_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handle of the venue */,
  "venue_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the race type (e.g., G1, G2, G3, LR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race type */,
  "race_type_distance_range" TEXT /* Range of distances for the race type */,
  "race_type_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the race type */,
  "race_type_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions typically associated with the race type */,
  "race_type_prize_money_range" TEXT /* Range of prize money for the race type */,
  "race_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainer, owner, bettor, admin) */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "user_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform */,
  "user_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the platform */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., prize money, entry fee, sponsorship) */,
  "amount_aud" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction in AUD */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "transaction_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "transaction_exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate if the transaction is in a different currency */,
  "transaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., race, sponsorship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rated the trainer */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the trainer (out of 5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., race, platform) */,
  "rating_context" TEXT /* Context or situation in which the rating was given */,
  "rating_status" TEXT /* Status of the rating (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "rating_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the rating was submitted */,
  "rating_device" TEXT /* Device used to submit the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_ratings_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
